title: Banana Delight Fritters
description: A festive Syrian dish featuring citrusy, gooey fried ripe bananas that are perfect for a quick snack or dessert.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and sugar.
Add in the ripe bananas, squeezing out some of the extra liquid with your hands.
Gradually add in the vegetable oil until you reach a smooth batter consistency.
Heat about 1/2 inch (1.3 cm) deep oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Once the oil is hot, drop spoonfuls of banana batter into the hot oil and fry for about 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess oil.
Squeeze half a lemon over the top before serving if desired, garnished with sesame seeds if using.
